known_gaps: Interface is dated and can be confusing for guests — affects direct booking conversion
OTA integrations are limited — primarily suited to direct booking rather than multi-channel distribution
Mobile experience is weak — guests booking on phones often have a poor experience
Customer communication tools are basic — automated sequences require a third-party tool
Reporting capabilities are limited compared to modern platforms
discovery_questions: How are you finding Bookeo for direct bookings — are you happy with the conversion on your website?
Do you use any OTAs alongside Bookeo, and if so, how do you manage inventory across them?
Are you doing any automated guest communication through Bookeo or is that handled separately?
fareharbor_comparison: Modern, mobile-first checkout with meaningfully higher conversion rates
Full OTA and channel manager integrations for multi-channel distribution
